metadata.description: hsdk — speed-first harness for Claude Code. Single-plugin marketplace; the repository is both the marketplace and the plugin.

plugins.name: hsdk
plugins.description: Speed-first harness for Claude Code: planner + dispatcher + workers with hard approval gate. Skills: /hsdk:plan (grilling + explicit approval), /hsdk:run (approved_at hard gate + worker dispatch, no retry), /hsdk:init (target-project bootstrap), /hsdk:status (active ticket overview), /hsdk:hsdk (router). Philosophy: 'plan さえ正確なら開発に問題はない' — Decision 3-tier grilling reaches 100% sync before any editor worker runs. Vertical-slice tasks (soft cap 2, hard cap 5). Intentionally dropped vs hfx: 4-signal scoring, retry, auto docs-keeper, status.md sentinel, log.md, backlog.md.
